---
title: "Quick Start"
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

## Quick Start

The app UI can be accessed via  `https://ngs-vm.biochem.mpg.de`

The older management sytem running using the perl scripts can be accessed via a different port -  `https://ngs-vm.biochem.mpg.de:9443/`

### Contents

- [Local dev — local mode](#local-dev--local-mode)
- [Local dev — LDAP simulation](#local-dev--ldap-simulation)
- [Local dev — unset](#local-dev--unset)
- [VM — LDAP mode (production)](#vm--ldap-mode-production)
- [VM — local mode (maintenance)](#vm--local-mode-maintenance)
- [VM — unset (clear overrides)](#vm--unset-clear-overrides)

#### Local dev — local mode

```r
Sys.setenv(APP_ENV = "dev", AUTH_MODE = "local")
shiny::runApp("sequencing-app")
```

#### Local dev — LDAP simulation

```r
Sys.setenv(
  APP_ENV = "dev",
  AUTH_MODE = "ldap",
  DEV_REMOTE_USER = "your_username",
  LDAP_URI = "ldaps://ldap01.example.internal:636,ldaps://ldap02.example.internal:636,ldaps://ldap03.example.internal:636",
  LDAP_BASE_DN = "dc=biochem,dc=mpg,dc=de"
)
shiny::runApp("sequencing-app")
```
To run this locally, replace "your_username" with actual user name.

#### Local dev — unset

```r
Sys.unsetenv(c(
  "APP_ENV","AUTH_MODE","DEV_REMOTE_USER",
  "LDAP_BIND_DN","LDAP_BIND_PW",
  "LDAP_URI","LDAP_BASE_DN","LDAP_DEBUG"
))
```

#### VM — LDAP mode (production)

```bash
sudo systemctl edit shiny-server
```

```ini
[Service]
Environment=AUTH_MODE=ldap
Environment=LDAP_URI=ldaps://ldap01.example.internal:636,ldaps://ldap02.example.internal:636,ldaps://ldap03.example.internal:636
Environment=LDAP_BASE_DN=dc=biochem,dc=mpg,dc=de
```

```bash
sudo systemctl restart shiny-server
```

#### VM — local mode (maintenance)

```ini
[Service]
Environment=AUTH_MODE=local
```

```bash
sudo systemctl restart shiny-server
```

#### VM — unset (clear overrides)

```bash
sudo systemctl edit shiny-server
# remove AUTH_MODE/LDAP_* lines, save, then:
sudo systemctl restart shiny-server
```
